de.uka.ilkd.key.logic

Interface Visitor

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    BoundVarsVisitor, ClashFreeSubst.VariableCollectVisitor, ConstraintAwareSyntacticalReplaceVisitor, DefaultVisitor, LightweightSyntacticalReplaceVisitor, OpCollector, SolverListener.ContainsModalityOrQueryVisitor, SortCollector, SVNameCorrespondenceCollector, SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.ContainsIrrelevantThingsVisitor, SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.ContainsModalityOrQueryVisitor, SyntacticalReplaceVisitor, TacletSchemaVariableCollector, TacletVariableSVCollector, TacletVisitor, TermProgramVariableCollector, TermProgramVariableCollectorKeepUpdatesForBreakpointconditions

    public interface Visitor

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void subtreeEntered(Term subtreeRoot)
      this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when entering the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot.
      void subtreeLeft(Term subtreeRoot)
      this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when leaving the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot.
      void visit(Term visited)
      the entry method for the visitor pattern
      boolean visitSubtree(Term visited)
      Checks if the subtree below the visited Term should be traversed.

    • Method Detail

      • visitSubtree

        boolean visitSubtree(Term visited)
        Checks if the subtree below the visited Term should be traversed.
        Parameters:
        visited - The currently visited Term.
        Returns:
        true visit sub tree, false skip sub tree.

      • visit

        void visit(Term visited)
        the entry method for the visitor pattern
        Parameters:
        visited - the Term to be visited

      • subtreeEntered

        void subtreeEntered(Term subtreeRoot)
        this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when entering the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot. Default implementation is to do nothing. Subclasses can override this method when the visitor behaviour depends on informations bound to subtrees.
        Parameters:
        subtreeRoot - root of the subtree which the visitor enters.

      • subtreeLeft

        void subtreeLeft(Term subtreeRoot)
        this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when leaving the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot. Default implementation is to do nothing. Subclasses can override this method when the visitor behaviour depends on informations bound to subtrees.
        Parameters:
        subtreeRoot - root of the subtree which the visitor leaves.
